videos.title: IELTS English Podcast - Speaking Topic: Technology
videos.description: Welcome to the thirty-sixth episode of the IELTS Plus English podcast, where you can learn vocabulary and phrases to talk about technology! Every week, listen to me answer REAL part 1, part 2, and part 3 questions from the IELTS exam, while trying to include 10 key words and phrases for each topic.

videos.title: IELTS Part 3, IELTS Question Practice, Technology, Daily English IELTS
videos.description:
2021 new IELTS questions. We are here to help you practice english for your better life.
IELTS DAILY QUESTION SPEAKING PRACTICE PART 3. 
BRITISH Accent IELTS speaking. 
Practice with us to improve your speaking skill.
For part 2 speaking practice click: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oLoWT...​
